things.name: National Monument (Monas)
things.description: 132-metre obelisk at the heart of Jakarta — take the lift to the flame viewing deck for city panoramas

things.name: Old Town Kota Tua
things.description: Dutch colonial quarter with painted townhouses around Fatahillah Square — Jakarta's historic heart

things.name: Istiqlal Mosque
things.description: Southeast Asia's largest mosque with capacity for 200,000 worshippers — free guided tours available

things.name: National Museum of Indonesia
things.description: The country's finest museum with artefacts from every Indonesian island — Borobudur bronzes and Wayang puppets

things.name: Thousand Islands Day Trip
things.description: Fast boat from Muara Baru harbour to snorkel, dive or relax on white-sand islands in Jakarta Bay

things.name: Grand Indonesia Shopping Mall
things.description: One of Southeast Asia's largest malls — shopping, restaurants and the iconic Welcome Statue outside

things.name: Wayang Museum
things.description: 1640 Dutch church converted to a museum of Javanese, Balinese and world shadow puppets

things.name: Bogor Botanical Gardens Day Trip
things.description: 15,000-plant garden set in the grounds of the Dutch colonial palace — 1 hour south of Jakarta

things.name: Ancol Dreamland
things.description: Jakarta's largest recreation complex — beach, waterpark, theme park and art market on the bay

things.name: Jalan Sabang Food Street
things.description: Jakarta's most famous food street — satay, martabak, nasi goreng and fresh juices until midnight
